title: Slovakian Yukon Gold Potato Fritters
description: A crispy, vegan version of traditional Slovakian fritters, using golden Yukon potatoes.
instructions: Grate the potatoes and squeeze out excess moisture
In a bowl, mix together the flour, cornstarch, and fry
Add the grated potatoes and mix until a dough forms
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape into patties
Heat a non-stick pan with air and fry the fritters until golden brown
Flip the fritters and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes
Serve the fritters hot with your favorite dipping sauce
